rows.label: tev000611_MSG0010
rows.name:
I was still knockin' back brews
celebrating the last win, when I got
word we're gonna be fighting again...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0020
rows.name:
Eh, no point gripin',
though. Work is work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0030
rows.name:
So, what's the word, then?
You need me right now?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0060
rows.name:
Great. Let's make it quick and come
back before my beer gets warm.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0090
rows.name:
That right? All right, I'll sit tight,
then. Maybe work on sobering up a bit...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0100
rows.name:
Hey there, old bud, good to see
you're still kickin'. Guess we're
just indestructible, huh? Aha ha ha![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0110
rows.name:
Mind getting a move on? We're smack dab
in the middle of enemy territory, and
that's no place for a peaceful drink.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev000611_MSG0120
rows.name:
Oh, uh, don't tell the others I smuggled in
booze, all right? Sharing is caring and all,
but sometimes I need it all to loosen up![ST:wait ]
